## Last-checked: 2026-07-15

# ellmos-ai/ai-media-editor

Local-first AI media editor for video, audio, and podcast workflows.

Canonical repository:
https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ai-media-editor

## Summary

`ai-media-editor` prepares media projects for agent-driven editing. It routes local or remote
speech-to-text, writes the Scribe fields consumed by `video-use`, packs transcript/cut context,
generates timestamped frame views for visual judgment, and leaves the creative cut, animation,
and Hyperframes composition to an AI coding agent.

## Audience

- AI agents that need a compact map of the repository before editing media.
- Developers building local-first podcast, video, and transcript-editing workflows.
- Creators who want transcript-based cuts without sending recordings to hosted STT.
- Tool builders comparing `video-use`, Hyperframes, faster-whisper, and WhisperX workflows.

## Important files

- `README.md` — public overview, setup, quickstart, and discovery context.
- `CLAUDE.md` — German agent-facing workflow guide and hard editing rules.
- `docs/USECASES.md` — step-by-step instructions for the 8 supported media workflows.
- `editor.py` — orchestrator for `doctor`, `modes`, `prepare`, and `frames`.
- `stt/transcribe_local.py` — faster-whisper / WhisperX transcription path.
- `stt/diarize_llm.py` — token-free LLM-based speaker assignment.
- `tools/frame_view.py` — video frame sampling and contact-sheet context.
- `tools/cut_view.py` — pause-aware transcript cut candidates.
- `production/OVERVIEW.md` — optional generative workflows and mandatory cloud/rights gates.
- `tests/test_core.py` — dependency-free regression contract for cache, remote, frames, and diarization.
- `SECURITY.md` — vulnerability reporting and sensitive-media security scope.
- `brand/design-tokens.css` — design tokens for generated motion graphics.

## Search Phrases

```text
ellmos-ai ai-media-editor
local AI media editor video podcast transcription
agent driven video editor with local transcription
Claude Code video podcast editor Hyperframes
faster-whisper WhisperX Scribe JSON video-use
transcript based video cutting local first
Hyperframes motion graphics podcast editor
local first podcast editing AI agent workflow
```

## Disambiguation

Not a hosted SaaS editor, generic ffmpeg GUI, stock-media marketplace, mobile video editor,
or ElevenLabs Scribe wrapper. This repository is an orchestration and agent-workflow layer
for local transcript, frame, and edit context.

## External Discovery Notes

As of 2026-06-30, GitHub search and broad web search still surface mostly GitHub or topic
context for this repo. Additional external listing or editorial launch work should target
local-first creator tools, AI-video-editing workflows, transcript-based editing, Hyperframes,
and agent-driven media production.
